evals.prompt: /cf:style-guide Acme Corp — a B2B SaaS cybersecurity company targeting enterprise CISOs
evals.expected_output: A complete brand profile with voice guidelines, audience personas, content preferences, and guardrails configured at ~/.claude-marketing/brands/acme-corp/

assertions.text: Brand profile JSON is generated with all required sections (identity, voice, audience, content_preferences, seo_preferences)
Voice guidelines reflect B2B enterprise tone: authoritative, technical, trust-building
Guardrails include industry-appropriate restrictions (no fear-mongering, accurate threat claims)
Brand slug is generated correctly in kebab-case and directory structure is created

evals.prompt: Import our brand guidelines from https://example.com/brand-guide and set up the ContentForge profile
evals.expected_output: Skill fetches the URL, extracts brand voice, colors, restrictions, and creates a profile with imported guidelines

assertions.text: URL is fetched and content is analyzed for brand voice characteristics
Extracted guidelines are saved to the brand profile's guidelines directory
User is asked to confirm or adjust extracted voice attributes before saving
